name: Ningbo Solartron Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ningbo Solartron Technology Co.,Ltd. researches, develops, produces, and sells functional films in China and internationally. It offers reflective, back sheet base, optical base, and other high performance functional films for use in liquid crystal display, semiconductor lighting, new energy, semiconductor flexible circuit board, and other fields. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Ningbo, China.
